spec_match.rationale: Excellent and accurate conceptual mappings. Correctly aligns old ARA mechanisms to the newer Protected Audience API, Private Aggregation API, Topics API, and Fenced Frame systems.

interactive.rationale: Contains a rich interactive wizard flow: step navigation buttons, clickable multi-state audit checklists (todo/pass/fail states), option selectors, and live capability probes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with parent description: includes migration steps, dynamic checklist, live feature-detection probe, and aggregate-to-measurement alternatives mapping.

edge_cases.rationale: Correctly captures different browser execution contexts, including cases where HTMLElement and window structures are stripped.

references.rationale: Includes highly useful reference URLs connecting back to the internal companion pages and target features.

design_system.rationale: Perfect design compliance. Color-coded indicators for old vs new code comparisons, nice wizard tabs, clean borders, and spacing.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: A phenomenal, masterfully designed interactive migration planner. By offering a structured step-by-step checklist, live browser diagnostic tools, before/after code comparisons, and clear alternatives mapping, it stands out as an incredibly useful and highly educational resource.
